The '''''Silooth''''' was the personal [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Peccati Syn]]. He named it after the [[Silooth/Legends|Silooth]], a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] animal.

The ''Silooth'' was vaporized by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces during the [[Liberation of Kashyyyk/Legends|Liberation of Kashyyyk]], killing both Syn and [[Merili]]. The ship was caught in a crossfire beween [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar's]] [[Home One/Legends|''Home One'']] and [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Verrack/Legends|Verrack's]] [[Maria (MC80 Star Cruiser)|''Maria'']].<ref name="TEGTW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
In a section of [[Who's Who: Imperial Grand Admirals|the ''Grand Admirals'' article]] that was cut, author [[Daniel Wallace|Dan Wallace]] mentioned that the ''Silooth'' was originally known as the ''Fi''.
